Describe the D590 resolution requirement for an uncertain durability result.

This helper does not perform the read. It only names the required next
boundary: explicit fact-log read plus idempotency/material-identity
resolution, followed by library-owned materialization if facts re-enter.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryDurabilityUncertainResolutionStatus } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryDurabilityUncertainResolutionStatus(result: AgenticMemoryDurabilityResult): AgenticMemoryDurabilityUncertainResolutionStatus
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `result` | `AgenticMemoryDurabilityResult` | D590 durability result DATA. |

## Returns

Whether explicit fact-log read resolution is required.
